name: King of Crabs
description: Easy to operate the krab,The Shell Gallery will show each roles armor, speed, skill, and pelt,The Equipment shop sells 5 Claws, 5 Bodies, and 5 Legs, Claim extra claw coins in the Sign and Spin,The Quick Match will make a fight with 24 players.The Ultimate Guide to Winning Tactics and Tips,Find a shell first. Collect and eat fish on the ground to grow up, Attack the weaker opponents.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
